title: Improve Google Calendar Sync
excerpt: Allow the ability to sync address/location to an item, as well as additional fields like text fields. Also add the ability to color code items in Google Calendar as they are color coded in Monday

posts.author: Highfillpainting (Paige)
posts.cookedHtml: Allow the ability to sync address/location to an item, as well as additional fields like text fields. Also add the ability to color code items in Google Calendar as they are color coded in Monday

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Highfillpainting ,

We recently launched the app Google Calendar Sync - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to sync location as well as multiple text & other types of columns as well. It will fit your use case perfectly.

Other Features

  1. Ability to select any calendar instead of default one
  2. Ability to create event on status column change
  3. Ability to configure realtime 1-way sync and 2-way sync as per need
  4. Ability to send invites to team members and guests from monday itself
